mapper.insert:
insert into pr_import_record (org_name, room_num, item_name, standard_price, card_num, trade_times, qty, receivable, payment_balance, paid_in, trade_time, allow_amount, deduction, create_by, create_time, type) values
(#{item.orgName}, #{item.roomNum}, #{item.itemName}, #{item.standardPrice}, #{item.cardNum}, #{item.tradeTimes}, #{item.qty}, #{item.receivable}, #{item.paymentBalance}, #{item.paidIn}, #{item.tradeTime}, #{item.allowAmount}, #{item.deduction}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.type})
mapper.update: update pr_import_record a left join pr_house b on a.room_num = b.room_num and a.org_name = b.org_name set a.house_id = b.id, a.org_id = b.org_id where a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0'
update pr_import_record a left join pr_expense_item b on a.item_name = b.name set a.item_id = b.id where a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0'

update pr_import_record a left join pr_heat_hot_archive b on a.house_id = b.house_id and a.card_num = b.card_num and b.is_changed = '0' set a.archive_id = b.archive_id, a.meter_num = b.meter_num, a.meter_arc_code = b.meter_arc_code, a.meter_serial = b.meter_serial, a.total_used = b.total_used, a.total_money = b.total_money, a.total_recharge = b.total_recharge, a.current_balance = b.current_balance where a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0'
mapper.select: select * from pr_import_record where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and (org_id is null or org_id = '') limit 500
select * from pr_import_record where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and (house_id is null or house_id = '') limit 500
select * from pr_import_record where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and (item_id is null or item_id = '') limit 500
select * from pr_import_record where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and (archive_id is null) limit 500
select * from pr_import_record where create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and receivable != paid_in + payment_balance
mapper.delete: delete from pr_import_record where create_by = #{create} and type = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into pr_transaction_record (id, org_id, house_id, item_id, standard_price, card_num, trade_times, qty, receivable, payment_balance, paid_in, trade_time, allow_amount, deduction, create_by, create_time) select CAST(CONV(SUBSTRING(REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), 18, 14), 16, 10) AS SIGNED), org_id, house_id, item_id, standard_price, card_num, trade_times, qty, receivable, payment_balance, paid_in, trade_time, allow_amount, deduction, create_by, now() from pr_import_record where create_by = #{create} and type = '0'
